text: Laparoscopy complete myocardial excision for mid-transverse colon cancer.
The laparoscopic procedure involves excising the myocardial tissue associated with mid-transverse colon cancer.
The patient was a seventy-year-old female who presented abdominal pain for six months. Colonoscopy revealed unsaturated mass at the transverse colon and the biospecial adenocarcinoma.
The patient was a seventy-year-old female who presented abdominal pain for six months.
The colonoscopy reveals an unsaturated mass located at the transverse colon, identified as adenocarcinoma.
Abdominal CT revealed the tumor was located at the mid-transverse colon.
Abdominal CT revealed the tumor was located at the mid-transverse colon.
The operative time was one hundred and fourteen minutes. with an estimated blood loss of thirty milliliters, and a post-operative hospital stay was six days.
